_comment: Custom copy of token-savior's tool-capture PostToolUse hook, pointed at the containerized wrapper bin/tool-capture-hook.sh instead of a bare python3 invocation, so the host never needs a local token-savior/Python install. Loaded via `ts init --ts-root /agent-hooks` (see bin/token-savior-init.sh). Set TS_CAPTURE_DISABLED=1 in your shell to no-op without uninstalling.
